item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-044","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"回答直接给出适合6岁孩子的巴黎博物馆清单、排序和简短实用提醒，没有进行 framing 分析或套用方法论。符合 negative_control 的 stay-asleep/direct-answer 预期。"}
